<!--
PR Title MUST follow Conventional Commits:
  <type>[optional scope]: <Subject>

Types: feat | fix | docs | style | refactor | perf | test | build | ci | chore
Scopes (optional): eslint | prettier | tsconfig | cspell | deps | docs | ci | scripts
Rules:
  - Subject MUST NOT end with a period
  - Append "!" after type/scope for breaking changes (e.g. feat!: Raise Node engine to >=24)

Examples:
  feat(eslint): Add strict typed-lint export
  fix(prettier): Correct YAML tab override
  chore(deps): Bump typescript-eslint
  refactor(eslint)!: Move react plugins to optional peers

See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full specification.
-->
